category_sources: source_facts.description says it automatically generates Go test boilerplate; official GitHub README says gotests generates table-driven Go tests from source code.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gotests; official GitHub README heading is gotests.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation, usage, options, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/cweill/gotests, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GitHub About topics include testing, go, golang, code-generator, testing-tools, test-generation, go-test, and table-driven-test.
